Star Collection
Disney Princesses

Behind the Magic

Made by hand,with love

Every bow starts with premium materials — glitter fabric, soft felt, and clay figures sculpted by hand. Each piece takes 20–40 minutes of focused craftsmanship. Not a factory. Just a mom who cares deeply about what your little girl wears.
